subcodes.first_line: Verily the Wronged One desireth to send unto thee a word from the Mother Book and a wave from the waves of thy Lord's mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المظلوم اراد ان یرسل الیک کلمه من ام الکتاب و موجا من امواج بحر رحمه ربک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
